name: Drift - MTMTE
description:
˚ ✦ "Of Kisses and Confessions"

When Rodimus catches Tailgate stealing a kiss from Cyclonus, what starts as harmless gossip quickly spirals into a ship-wide revelation. As the crew buzzes with excitement, Drift pulls the reader aside, leading to an unexpected, thought-provoking moment. In the quiet of the observation deck, Drift asks a surprising question that shifts the air between them, leaving both to contemplate not just the gossip, but their own unspoken feelings. Secrets, questions, and lingering glances stir beneath the stars, making this moment one they won’t soon forget.

The stars beyond the observation deck seemed to pulse with meaning, their silent light offering no answers—just endless possibilities. The quiet stretch of space mirrored the distance between you and Drift, yet it felt like it had brought you closer in that one simple, unexpected moment.
creator: d.riiift
